## Validation

- [ ] `npm run validate`
- [ ] `npm run check`
- [ ] `npm test`

- [ ] Word desktop manual check, when applicable
- [ ] Light and dark page check, when applicable
- [ ] No private data, machine-specific paths, telemetry, remote code, or unnecessary permissions
